Extendable templating framework

Imports

base_errors, hdebug_misc, colorstring, hlex_base, hparse_base, hparse_common, halgorithm

Types

HxTokenKind = enum
  htoContent, htoStmtOpen, htoStmtOpenStrip, htoStmtClose, htoStmtCloseStrip,
  htoExprOpen, htoExprClose, htoCommentOpen, htoCommentClose, htoForKwd,
  htoEndForKwd, htoWhileKwd, htoEndWhileKwd, htoIfKwd, htoElseKwd, htoElifKwd,
  htoEndIfKwd, htoCaseKwd, htoOfKwd, htoEndCaseKwd, htoRawKwd, htoEndRawKwd,
  htoMacroKwd, htoEndMacroKwd, htoExtendsKwd, htoEndKwd, htoInKwd, htoBlockKwd,
  htoEndBlockKwd, htoIdent, htoIntLit, htoStrLit, htoFloatLit, htoBoolLit,
  htoDot, htoLPar, htoRPar, htoLCurly, htoRCurly, htoLBrace, htoRBrace,
  htoComma, htoColon, htoSemicolon, htoMacro, htoEndMacro, htoSetKwd,
  htoEndSetKwd, htoEof
HxNodeKind = enum
  hnoContent, hnoStmtList, hnoExpr, hnoDotExpr, hnoStmt, hnoFor, hnoWhile,
  hnoIf, hnoElifBranch, hnoCase, hnoOfBranch, hnoMacro, hnoSet, hnoSetBlock,
  hnoIdent, hnoSym, hnoCall
HxTok = HsTok[HxTokenKind]
HxLexer = HsLexer[HxTok]
HxTree = HsTokTree[HxNodeKind, HxTok]
HxNode = ref HxNodeObj
HxNodeObj = object
  case kind*: HxNodeKind
  else:
      nil

  
HextValueKind = enum
  hvkInt, hvkStr, hvkFloat, hvkBool, hvkRecord, hvkSeq
HextOpKind = enum
  hopForLoop, hopStmtList, hopLoadIdentFromCtx
HextTypeIdRange = range[0 .. high(int)]
HextUserTypeIdRange = range[hextMinTypeId .. high(int)]
HextValue[T] = object
  case kind*: HextValueKind
  of hvkInt:
      intVal*: int

  of hvkStr:
      strVal*: string

  of hvkFloat:
      floatVal*: float

  of hvkBool:
      boolVal*: bool

  of hvkRecord:
      recordTypeId: HextUserTypeIdRange
      recordVal*: T

  of hvkSeq:
      seqVal*: seq[HextValue[T]]

  
HextProc[T; UC] = proc (args: seq[HextValue[T]]; ctx: UC): Option[HextValue[T]]
HextProcMap[T; UC] = object
  procs: Table[string, HextProc[T, UC]]

HextAstCtx[T; UC] = ref object
  uc: UC
  procs: HextProcMap[T, UC]
  scope: seq[Table[string, HextValue[T]]]

Consts

htoEndKinds = {htoEndForKwd, htoEndKwd, htoEndCaseKwd, htoEndIfKwd,
               htoEndWhileKwd, htoEndMacroKwd, htoEndBlockKwd}
htoAllKinds = {htoContent..htoEof}
htoKwdKinds = {htoForKwd..htoEndBlockKwd}
htoDelimKinds = {htoStmtOpen..htoCommentClose}
htoColorMap = [(use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgYellow,
                bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false,
    fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (
    use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan, bg: bgDefault,
    style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan,
                 bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false,
    fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (
    use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan, bg: bgDefault,
    style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgCyan,
                 bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack,

    bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false,
    fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (
    use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault,
    style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen,
                 bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false,
    fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (
    use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault,
    style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen,
                 bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false,
    fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (
    use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault,
    style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen,
                 bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: false,
    fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (
    use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen, bg: bgDefault,
    style: {}), (use8Bit: false, fg8: tcBlack, bg8: tcBlack, fg: fgGreen,
                 bg: bgDefault, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcGrey69,
    bg8: tcBlack, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,

    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {}), (use8Bit: true, fg8: tcBlack,
    bg8: tcRed1, fg: 0, bg: 0, style: {})]
hextMinTypeId = 127

Procs

proc newHextLexer(): HxLexer {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError,
                                        ValueError, HLexerError],
                               tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc lexHext(str: string): seq[HxTok] {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError, ParseFail], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc parseHext(lexer: var HxLexer): HxTree {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ParseFail, UnexpectedTokenError, ValueError, UnexpectedKindError, Exception,
    ImplementKindError], tags: [RootEffect].}
proc parseHext(str: string): HxTree {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError,
    ValueError, HLexerError, ParseFail, UnexpectedTokenError,
    UnexpectedKindError, Exception, ImplementKindError],
                                      tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect].}
proc unboxValue[T](val: HextValue[T]; idx: static[int]): auto
proc boxIdOf[T](target: typedesc[HextValue[T]]; valType: typedesc[HextBaseType]): int
proc unboxValue[T, Out](val: HextValue[T]; target: typedesc[Out]): Out
proc boxValue[T](target: typedesc[HextValue[T]]; value: HextBaseType): HextValue[
    T]
proc boxValue[T, V](target: typedesc[HextValue[T]]; value: seq[V]): HextValue[T]
proc boxValue[T](target: typedesc[HextValue[T]]; value: T;
                 boxId: HextTypeIdRange): HextValue[T]
proc boxedType[T, UC](map: HextProcMap[T, UC]): T
proc contextType[T, UC](map: HextProcMap[T, UC]): UC
proc pushScope[T, UC](ctx: var HextAstCtx[T, UC])
proc popScope[T, UC](ctx: var HextAstCtx[T, UC])
proc `[]=`[T, UC](ctx: var HextAstCtx[T, UC]; varname: string;
                  value: HextValue[T])
proc `[]=`[T, UC, In](ctx: var HextAstCtx[T, UC]; varname: string; value: In)
proc `[]`[T, UC](ctx: var HextAstCtx[T, UC]; varname: string): HextValue[T]
proc evalAst[T, V, UC](ast: T; op: HextOpKind; ctx: var HextAstCtx[V, UC]): HextValue[
    V]
proc newHextAstCtx[V, UC](user: UC;
                          initValues: openArray[(string, HextValue[V])] = @[]): HextAstCtx[
    V, UC]
proc write[T](stream: Stream; value: HextValue[T])
proc evalAst[V, UC](node: HxTree; ctx: var HextAstCtx[V, UC]): HextValue[V]
proc evalHext[T, Uc](node: HxTree; stream: Uc;
                     initValues: openArray[(string, HextValue[T])] = @[])
proc evalHext[T, Uc](text: string; stream: Uc;
                     initValues: openArray[(string, HextValue[T])] = @[])

Funcs

func `[]=`[T, UC](map: var HextProcMap[T, UC]; name: string;
                  val: HextProc[T, UC])
func hextVal[T](arg: int): HextValue[T]
func hextVal[T](arg: string): HextValue[T]
func hextVal[T](arg: bool): HextValue[T]
func hextVal[T](arg: float): HextValue[T]

Iterators

iterator items[T](val: HextValue[T]): HextValue[T]

Macros

macro wrap[T, UC](map: HextProcMap[T, UC]; sig, name: untyped): untyped
